**Commit**: `0f8149737690` — chore: sync loom — RS 3.12.1 security red team updates

**Body**:

Gate 2 distribution from loom after ingesting kailash-rs 3.12.1
security red team proposal (PR #322). Core SKILL crate map expanded
with 10 new crates (mcp, auth, enterprise-nodes, plugin-guest/macros,
capi, cli, marketplace, rl, align-serving, ml, bindings). Kaizen LLM
providers adds Azure/Ollama/HuggingFace/Perplexity/Docker + capability
traits + SSRF protection. Security-patterns SKILL updated with
convergence patterns (url_safety, JWT zeroization, packed atomic rate
limiter, deny_unknown_fields, auth config debug redaction).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
